name: les-mates-platform
description: Financial management platform with RBAC and multi-tenant support

scripts.migrate: docker-compose exec postgres psql -U postgres -d les_mates -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/01-init.sql
scripts.seed: npm run seed:auth && npm run seed:rbac && npm run seed:finance
scripts.seed:auth: docker-compose exec auth-service npm run seed
scripts.seed:rbac: docker-compose exec rbac-service npm run seed
scripts.seed:finance: docker-compose exec finance-service npm run seed
